---
title: "\'The Brownies\'"
---

## \'The Brownies\'

**Author:** Juliana Horatia Ewing
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (December 1865) 658-702

### Notes

It was reprinted Ewing\'s <i>The Brownies and Other Tales</i> (London: Bell and Daldy 1870). 

 When girls joined the Scouting movement in 1914 they were first of all called Rosebuds, but the name was disliked and in 1915 Lord Baden Powell named them instead after this story at the suggestion of his sister Agnes.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
